commands.review_summary:
This PR removes the direct-chat-only guard from quiet channel-owned progress callback forwarding and updates the dispatch regression test to expect group callbacks when verbose output is off.

PR surface: Source -1, Tests +12. Total +11 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has a direct-chat-only quiet progress gate and the existing group test asserts every channel-owned progress callback is suppressed while verbose is off; I did not execute the test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated code repair is needed; the remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real behavior proof plus normal CI validation.

target.title: fix(dispatch): forward channel-owned progress callbacks in all chat types when verbose is off
target.body:
## Summary

- Removes the `chatType === "direct"` guard from `shouldAllowQuietDirectNativeProgressCallbacks` (renamed to `shouldAllowQuietChannelOwnedProgressCallbacks`)
- Channel-owned native progress callbacks (`onToolStart`, `onItemEvent`, `onPlanUpdate`, `onApprovalEvent`, `onCommandOutput`, `onPatchSummary`, `onCompactionStart/End`) are now forwarded in group and channel sessions when `/verbose off` is set
- Previously, `/verbose off` suppressed all progress callbacks in group sessions while direct sessions continued to relay them

## Context

Reported as #87612. In group/channel Discord sessions with `/verbose off`, users see no tool progress — no indication the agent is working. The `chatType === "direct"` guard was overly restrictive: message-level tool summary suppression is handled separately and native channel relay hooks should not be gated on chat type.

## Test plan

- [x] Updated existing test: changed from asserting callbacks are **not** called to asserting they **are** called with expected payloads in group sessions with verbose off
- [x] Verified fix on live Discord group channel — tool progress callbacks (Exec, show data, create folder) visible with `/verbose off`

Closes #87612

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
